# perfs

Umbrella for reusable client-side performance primitives — the home for the
shared substrate that measures and traces browser-side work (boot timing, and
future runtime perf instruments). Each member is a dependency-light primitive,
not a debug pane.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Umbrella for client-side performance primitives.
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`boot-trace`** — Module-level boot-span store imported eagerly by the framework boot path. Captures one-clock boot spans (startBootSpan/markBootInstant/recordBootSpan) and folds in Navigation/Paint Timing plus the first React commit; getBootTrace() assembles the trace.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
